title: Workshop: CDIF Website Maintenance
summary: A hands-on workshop covering best practices for maintaining and updating the CDIF website, including content management, Markdown editing, and deployment workflows.

title: FAIR Data Symposium 2026
summary: CDIF will be featured prominently in the technical track of the upcoming FAIR Data Symposium.

title: Cross-Domain Metadata Interoperability: A Technical White Paper
summary: This new technical publication details the underlying architectural patterns used in CDIF for semantic mapping.

title: CDIF Public Consultation Webinar
summary: Join us for a deep dive into the CDIF 1.0 draft modules and provide your feedback.

title: Case Study: CDIF Implementation in Global Health Data
summary: A comprehensive analysis of how CDIF profiles were applied to harmonize health surveys across multiple continents.

title: CDIF Version 1.0 Draft Released
summary: The first public draft of the Cross-Domain Interoperability Framework is now available for review.

title: Implementation Guidelines for Geospatial Data
summary: Specific focus group results on geospatial metadata mappings published.

title: New Governance Structure Approved
summary: CODATA formalizes the technical advisory board for CDIF sustainability.
